theme: one shopkeeper brain for seasonal, bursty, trending demand
title: One Shopkeeper Brain: Reorder Policies Across Demand Families
strategies: flat-mean order-up-to, no adaptation (reproduces the evaluator's own weak baseline reference)
textbook mean + 1-std safety stock applied identically to every line (no classification, no seasonal shape, no trend, no reactive hedge, no cost-aware buffer sizing)

cheap online hypothesis test per line (zero-fraction / variance-to-mean ratio / seasonal between-phase strength / trend R^2) to classify the family, then a newsvendor critical-fractile empirical-quantile buffer sized from the cost parameters, plus a small always-on reactive hedge against a regime shift the calibration window could not have seen
